title: Visibility Key
description: Visibility allows you to override the invisibility effect, making affected players’ nicknames and skins visible. It also includes an option to hide titles, with all features easily toggleable through configurable keybindings.
body:
Visibility is a client-side mod that allows you to force the display of nicknames and skins of players affected by invisibility, visually overriding the effect on the client. Additionally, it includes the ability to hide on-screen titles, with keybindings that allow each feature to be toggled on or off quickly and easily.

Fabric
